metadata.description: The companion Claude Code plugin marketplace for the Claude Code for Social Scientists guide.

plugins.name: social-cc-plugin
plugins.description: Ten project skills for social science research with Claude Code: literature triage, APA 7 DOI verification, bilingual booklet pairing, AI disclosure auditing, ethics and IRB protocols, rebuttal traceability, research vault architecture, regional academic access, agentic session debugging, and pre-release repository integrity checks.
